textByHash.533bc7670a7e059203aac6f4ec8e672ca75e3728: ... and that he should be back soon. Why do you need to see him anyway, Attala? And how come you have a human priest with you?
textByHash.696f2f66b173ee99bd332f22e6008449f00335a5: Oh, I suppose so. Do keep out of the basement though. Teumo doesn't like people going down there.
textByHash.fe1673d01a4120648a8692b272890f4d1299c578: Oh, thank you, but I'm fine.
textByHash.24253983740e6aab6fe5d165d04ee223a915c520: Very tempting, but I shouldn't really start drinking at this time...
textByHash.7f67e468bf3f0d7cc3baf5393a1195bcc8c277d0: Well, I guess it would be rude to say no...
textByHash.c91c2adb234276964be142b13aca6315cef463aa: Not at all! My home is yours. Go wherever you want!
textByHash.bb6314e907da98b9490078c4753f3758fd1a6695: Another human? Do what you need to and then be gone from here.
textByHash.6389b99ce2117e3659f63cc80a65f28c5a9e6eda: Every day they let more of your kind in.
textByHash.84b0f37307934b243ad4dff330d3cc8fdab1603f: I don't talk to you lot.
